context: Edge-case stress test. Includes a question with no KB coverage.

questions.text: Does your platform currently support quantum-resistant (post-quantum) cryptographic algorithms for data in transit? If so, which.

Describe your incident response process: (a) how are customers notified of a confirmed breach, (b) what is the SLA for critical vulnerability remediation, and (c) how frequently do you undergo third-party penetration testing?
Provide pricing for 750 endpoints including the MDR add-on, on a 36-month term.
